ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Continued To Feb-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-01-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Simon for and with Eva Mohrman (Petitioner).

The Court noted that the holographic will was proved by Ms. Morhman who is also the Beneficiary. Mr. Simon stated that he is not aware of anyone objecting, that he is contact with the Decedent's Sister and that the Sister is in support of this. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed (order signed in open Court). Bond is not required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
